summary: First-pass full e2e validation of Property Driving School Car Hire. Backend (12 pytest cases) and frontend (Playwright e2e) all pass. Smart-pricing logic (weekday R499/day vs Fri-Mon R3000 package) is correct on both server (calculate_quote) and client (lib/pricing.js mirror). RESEND_API_KEY is empty as expected; /api/health returns email_configured=false, bookings persist with email_sent=false. Full booking flow (select car → pick dates → fill personal → submit) works and shows success card with ref id.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp float button href is 'https://wa.me/27744634514?text=Hi%20Levah...' — base number matches spec; prefilled text is a nice UX touch (acceptable, not a bug).
Booking quote display uses server-trusted re-computation in POST /api/bookings — good, client value is not trusted (verified).
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from /api/bookings GET via projection {_id: 0} — verified no leak.

Pricing edge case: a Friday pickup with days <= 3 always returns R3000 weekend pkg, even for a 1-day Fri→Sat rental (R499/day would be cheaper). Could be intentional ('Fri-Mon package') but worth confirming with owner whether weekend pkg should auto-apply only when duration is >= 2 days, or compute min(weekday, weekend) per fairness.

No rate limiting or duplicate-submission guard on /api/bookings — a refreshed/double-clicked submit could create duplicates. Front-end disables button while submitting, which is the primary guard; consider adding server-side dedupe by (email, car_id, pickup_date) within a short window for robustness.
Booking model uses created_at as ISO string; sorting works correctly because ISO 8601 is lexicographically sortable.
EmailStr is used on BookingCreate (pydantic[email]) — invalid emails returned 422 cleanly. Good.
test_credentials: n/a — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_ prefixed bookings during pytest run + 1 during Playwright UI flow. All cleaned up via db.bookings.deleteMany({full_name: /^TEST_/}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_carhire_api.py (pytest). Re-run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Frontend public URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Mongo TEST_ data should be cleaned up after each run. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty until the owner pastes a key.
verified_features: POST /api/quote weekday-only Mon→Thu (3d) → R1497 rental, R1000 dep, R2497 total, is_weekend_package=false
POST /api/quote Fri→Mon (3d) → R3000 pkg, total R4000, is_weekend_package=true
POST /api/quote Fri→Sat (1d) → R3000 pkg (weekend rule applies for days<=3)
POST /api/quote Fri→Wed (5d) → weekday pricing R2495 (days>3 disables pkg)
POST /api/bookings → persists to Mongo, returns email_sent=false, server-computed quote
GET /api/bookings → sorted desc by created_at, no _id leak
Frontend hero heading 'Premium car hire in Giyani' present
WhatsApp float btn → https://wa.me/27744634514?text=... (base number correct)
Nav Book Now button scrolls to #booking section
Fleet shows 10 sedans tab + 4 SUVs tab, all data-testids present
Click 'Book this car' on Toyota Rumion → prefills booking-car-select with 'Toyota Rumion'
Full booking flow: car select + calendar pickers + name/phone/email → success card with ref ID + WhatsApp CTA
